/home/linuxbrew/.linuxbrew/bin/g++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,-rpath,$ORIGIN -shared -Wl,-soname,libtokenizers_wrapper.so.1 -o libtokenizers_wrapper.so.1.0.0 CMakeFiles/tokenizers_wrapper.dir/src/model_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tokenizers_wrapper.dir/src/tokenizer_wrapper.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tokenizers_wrapper.dir/src/tokenizers_c.cpp.o  tokenizers-ffi/release/libtokenizers_ffi.a -ldl -lpthread
